ab: mo mainenu co hie maitan’e?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: micu espayo si hie. mo na’no mu’ei.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: mio nana soyʉmʉ si yafana?
en: A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: mo na’no soyʉmʉ, te aʉyʉcʉ sʉ’eʉsʉ.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: mio na’no mu’ei si yafana?
en: A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: o’a mios’a, micu poepe, na’no sohuyu.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.

ab: mo mainenu co hie maitan’e?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: maitan’e o’a mo soyʉmʉ, o’a mo mu’ei,mo na’no sohuyu.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: te nana mainenu na hie ho yofna?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: o’a mo yaa cmʉcmʉ ta engʉca, cu espayo ta congeoha.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: mo mainenu co hie ta yafana?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: micu tosvo mʉchʉ, cu espayo si hie, ho yuyafo ta hioyu.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: mio mainenu na hie no imu yoni?
en: A: How is the weather there?

ab: mo na’no poepe ’e imza yoni.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: mio ʉmnʉ na hie no iko yoni?
en: A: How's the weather there?

ab: mio na’no ʉmnʉ, mo yuyafo ta hie.
en: B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: te’o cu toatmopsʉ.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: mo na’no soyʉmʉ ’e hie,mateoskopʉ no yʉsʉ.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: te’o cu emoyafo.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: tenac’u smʉnʉ’ʉ, teko talua mahafo to oyofnga.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.

ab: tee eno mʉchʉ?
en: A: Is it going to rain?

ab: mo muni ’o ak’e engʉca, tena ahtuo’te mʉchʉ.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.

ab: micu mʉchʉ?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: moso mʉchʉ, micu tosvo.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.

ab: micu mʉchʉ?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: mais’a moso cu mʉchʉ, mo noe’ʉcʉ ’e ceonʉ.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: mio mʉchʉ? mainci aucunu noe’ʉcʉ si feangosu?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: mo mʉchʉ si yafana, mo’u ta’payo’ʉ maafo to oyofnga.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.

ab: miko ʉm’ʉmnʉ?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: mo na’no poepe, anga ta’poepza cu congo co fnguu’u.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: miko ʉm’ʉmnʉ?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: mo na’no cong’e hie, anga hioza cu moyomo co fnguu’u.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
